text.title: Shadow Handover Session Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: agree task list → run session → log gaps → sign-off → defer-or-document.

step.name: agree-task-list
step.action: Run `task-list-prep`. Define ≥ 5 representative operational tasks (incident response, deploy, rollback, restore-from-backup, on-call ritual).
step.decision-gate: If < 5 representative tasks identifiable, system is too small for shadow handover; use doc walkthrough.

step.name: run-session
step.action: Receiver drives every task. Outgoing engineer silent default. Time-box 2-4 hours; budget includes sign-off slot.

step.name: log-gaps
step.input: Receiver's questions during session + outgoing engineer's answers
step.action: Run `gap-log-synthesis`. Record every Q/A pair; attach doc_link if exists, else mark as open action item.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Run `sign-off-drafter`. Both engineers review and sign. Enumerate `spf_undocumented` items explicitly.
step.decision-gate: If any task missing verdict OR sign-off unsigned, schedule a second session before rotation date.

step.name: defer-or-document
step.input: Open action items from gap_log + spf_undocumented list
step.action: Convert each open item to a documentation ticket OR schedule a second session. Update doc_link as items resolve.
